// src/pages/LogoutPage.js import React from "react"; import "./LogoutPage.css"; export default function LogoutPage({ navigate, onLogout }) { const handleLogout = async () => { if (onLogout) await onLogout(); if (navigate) navigate("landing"); }; const handleCancel = () => { if (navigate) navigate("dashboard"); }; return (
{/* Page heading */}

Log out

You're about to log out of your account.

{/* Card */}
{/* Icon */}
{/* logout SVG icon */}
{/* decorative sparkles */} ✦ + + ✦
{/* Title & subtitle */}

Log out of your account?

You'll need to log in again to access your account
and continue your progress.

{/* Data safe notice */}
Your data is safe Your progress, settings, and data will be securely saved and available when you log in again.
{/* Actions */}
); }
